sentences.text: The painting that hangs in the main hall was donated by a wealthy collector.
sentences.translation_zh: 挂在大厅里的那幅画是由一位富有的收藏家捐赠的。
sentences.translation_vi: Buc tranh treo o sanh chinh duoc tang boi mot nha suu tap giau co.

sentences.text: The guide explained that the sculpture had been carved from a single piece of marble.
sentences.translation_zh: 导游解释说这座雕塑是由一整块大理石雕刻而成的。
sentences.translation_vi: Huong dan vien giai thich rang buc tuong duoc cham khac tu mot khoi da cam thach.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de tuong thuat
vi ngu bi dong hoan thanh

sentences.text: Visitors who touch the artworks will be asked to leave the gallery immediately.
sentences.translation_zh: 触摸艺术品的参观者将被要求立即离开画廊。
sentences.translation_vi: Khach tham quan cham vao tac pham nghe thuat se bi yeu cau roi khoi phong trung bay ngay lap tuc.

sentences.text: The exhibition which featured contemporary art attracted thousands of visitors.
sentences.translation_zh: 以当代艺术为特色的展览吸引了数千名参观者。
sentences.translation_vi: Trien lam gioi thieu nghe thuat duong dai da thu hut hang nghin khach tham quan.

sentences.text: She said that the colours in the portrait reminded her of a sunset.
sentences.translation_zh: 她说肖像画中的色彩让她想起了日落。
sentences.translation_vi: Co ay noi rang mau sac trong buc chan dung lam co ay nho den hoang hon.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de tuong thuat

sentences.text: The museum where the ancient artefacts are displayed is open every day except Monday.
sentences.translation_zh: 展示古代文物的博物馆每天开放，周一除外。
sentences.translation_vi: Bao tang noi trung bay co vat co mo cua moi ngay tru thu Hai.

sentences.text: I wish I could paint as beautifully as the artists whose work I admire.
sentences.translation_zh: 我希望我能画得和我欣赏的那些艺术家一样美。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi uoc toi co the ve dep nhu nhung nghe si ma toi nguong mo.

sentences.text: It is estimated that the painting is worth over fifty million dollars.
sentences.translation_zh: 据估计这幅画价值超过五千万美元。
sentences.translation_vi: Nguoi ta uoc tinh buc tranh co gia tri hon nam muoi trieu do la.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de danh tu

sentences.text: The mural on the building was painted by local artists to celebrate their heritage.
sentences.translation_zh: 建筑上的壁画是由当地艺术家绘制的，以庆祝他们的文化遗产。
sentences.translation_vi: Buc tranh tuong tren toa nha duoc ve boi cac nghe si dia phuong de ton vinh di san.

sentences.text: Although modern art can be confusing, I find it fascinating and thought-provoking.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然现代艺术可能令人困惑，但我觉得它既迷人又发人深省。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du nghe thuat hien dai co the gay kho hieu, toi thay no hap dan va goi mo suy nghi.

sentences.text: The curator told us that the collection had been assembled over several decades.
sentences.translation_zh: 策展人告诉我们这个收藏是在几十年间汇集而成的。
sentences.translation_vi: Nguoi phu trach noi voi chung toi rang bo suu tap da duoc tap hop trong nhieu thap ky.

constituents.label_vi: chu ngu menh de tuong thuat
vi ngu bi dong hoan thanh

sentences.text: The pottery that was discovered in the ruins dates back to the Bronze Age.
sentences.translation_zh: 在废墟中发现的陶器可以追溯到青铜时代。
sentences.translation_vi: Do gom duoc phat hien trong di tich co nien dai tu thoi dai Do Dong.

sentences.text: He asked me whether I had ever visited the national art gallery before.
sentences.translation_zh: 他问我以前是否参观过国家美术馆。
sentences.translation_vi: Anh ay hoi toi lieu toi da bao gio tham quan phong trung bay nghe thuat quoc gia chua.

sentences.text: The skills that are needed to restore old paintings take many years to develop.
sentences.translation_zh: 修复古画所需的技能需要很多年才能培养。
sentences.translation_vi: Nhung ky nang can thiet de phuc che tranh cu mat nhieu nam de phat trien.

sentences.text: If the weather is fine tomorrow, we should visit the outdoor sculpture garden.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果明天天气好的话，我们应该去参观户外雕塑花园。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu ngay mai thoi tiet dep, chung ta nen tham vuon tuong ngoai troi.
